sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Buffalo</city> <country>United States</country> <description>purus eu magna vulputate luctus cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis</description> <end_date/> <make>Ford</make> <model>Mustang</model> <pin>3265</pin> <start_date>2024-11-10</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 04:59:09</sys_created_on> <sys_id>c8b5c3e6fd4b32107f44b9211467fe26</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 04:59:09</sys_updated_on> <vin>5NPDH4AE9EH551260</vin> <year>2024</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
